stemHtml: In which case should a Contracting State (of the Chicago Convention) waive the visa requirement for a crew member identifying him-/herself with a Crew Member Certificate (CMC)?

options.a: When arriving in an off-duty status on an international flight and seeking temporary entry.
options.b: When arriving in an off-duty status on an international flight and seeking entry for less than 24 hours.
options.c: When arriving in a duty status on an international flight and seeking temporary entry.
options.d: When arriving in a duty status on an international flight and seeking entry for less than 24 hours.
